hooks.command:
python3 -c "
import json, subprocess, sys
from pathlib import Path
state_path = Path('catalog/session_state.json')
if not state_path.exists():
    sys.exit(0)
with open(state_path) as f:
    state = json.load(f)
last = state.get('last_updated', '')
head = subprocess.run(['git', 'rev-parse', '--short', 'HEAD'], capture_output=True, text=True).stdout.strip()
known_sha = state.get('known_state', {}).get('main_sha', '')
if head != known_sha:
    print(f'\n[session-handoff] HEAD is {head}, session_state.json still shows {known_sha}.')
    print('[session-handoff] Consider updating catalog/session_state.json before closing so Codex has current context.')
    print('[session-handoff] Key fields to refresh: last_updated, last_platform, recent_commits, known_state.main_sha')
"
